text.tspan: Percentage of territory effectively controlled by government, 2023
Based on the expert estimates by V-Dem . They consider the extent to which the government is recognized as
the main authority, or rejected by others, such as insurgent groups, criminal organizations, or other countries.
Note: Values are missing if the country is not independent.
